_notes: Per-(Company, Metric) source citation overrides. When a data agent verifies a metric value against a primary source, populate { source, source_url, last_updated } here and the dashboard automatically overlays it onto the matching row. Until populated, the dashboard shows 'Pending' on that metric.
_acceptable_sources: Screener (https://www.screener.in) — only where source attribution is clear
_disallowed_sources: Aggregator news sites without primary citation

_vehicle_field_sources.Image_URL: Official OEM website / media kit / product gallery
_vehicle_field_sources.Demand_Read: Monthly SIAM data, OEM dispatch press releases, segment trackers
_vehicle_field_sources.Launch_Status: OEM press releases, official launch announcements
_vehicle_field_sources.Key_Driver: Investor presentation segment commentary, annual report MD&A
_vehicle_field_sources.Vehicle_Insight: Buy-side analyst note based on the above primary sources

Market Share %.source: SIAM monthly data via Maruti Q4FY25 result presentation
